entries.title: Verify Execution Log in local browser
entries.command: python3 -m http.server 8765 --bind 127.0.0.1; browser QA at http://127.0.0.1:8765/
entries.output_summary: Execution Log loaded all records, keyboard tab semantics remained intact, visual inspection found no overlap or clipping in light mode, and the browser console reported zero JavaScript errors.
